task.title: Removing files from the Retrieved Data Sets filter
task.shortdesc: You can add data sets to or remove data sets from the Retrieved Data Sets folder of MVS Files and set the maximum number of data sets for this filter. Removing a data set from Retrieved Data Sets does not delete the data set.

keywords.indexterm: Retrieved Data Setsremove a data set
remove a data set from Retrieved Data Sets

step.cmd: To manage the Retrieved Data Sets filter, select it, and then right-click and select Manage from the menu.

substep.cmd: To set the maximum number of data sets that are displayed in this filter, in the Maximum number of data sets shown in this filter field, specify a number 1 - 999999999.
